name: One Punch!
title: Single Target
desc_lv1: Deals Imaginary DMG equal to 100% of Silver Wolf LV.999's ATK to one designated enemy.
raw_html_lv1: Deals Imaginary DMG equal to 100% of Silver Wolf LV.999's ATK to one designated enemy.

name: Trigger Happy
title: AoE
desc_lv1: Gains 5 Punchline point(s) and deals Imaginary DMG equal to 160% of Silver Wolf LV.999's ATK to all enemies.
raw_html_lv1: Gains 5 Punchline point(s) and deals Imaginary DMG equal to 160% of Silver Wolf LV.999's ATK to all enemies.

name: God Mode: ON!
title: Enhance
desc_lv1:
Enters the "Godmode Player" state, and advances action by 100%.
Deploys a Zone while in the "Godmode Player" state. While Silver Wolf LV.999 possesses "Certified Banger," each time an ally target within the Zone consumes 1 Skill Point, there is a chance to trigger 1 time Silver Wolf LV.999's "Top Loot Box": Deal Imaginary Elation DMG equal to 90% split evenly among all enemies, and randomly trigger 1 of the following effects:
"Big Flipping Sword": Additionally deals True DMG to the enemy target with the highest HP equal to 20% of the total DMG dealt this time.
"Kaboom Eggsplosion": Recovers 2 Skill Point(s).
"Funky Munch Bean": Gains 3 Punchline(s).
The initial fixed chance to trigger this effect is 100%. After successfully triggering, the fixed chance for the subsequent trigger is reduced to 20% of the current chance. If the target is defeated before triggering, this effect triggers on the enemy target that just entered instead.

name: This? Absolute Meta!
title: Summon
desc_lv1:
Summons "Funky Munch Bean." Use again to dismiss. Using Technique does not consume Technique Points. When Technique Points reach 0, the summon is dismissed and Technique cannot be used.
"Funky Munch Bean" causes Normal Enemies within a certain range to enter a Terrified state. It will also automatically search for and attack Normal Enemies, consuming 1 Technique Point to instantly defeat them without entering combat.
While "Funky Munch Bean" is present, after entering combat, 1 instance of "Top Loot Box" from "Funky Munch Bean" is triggered at the start of each wave. The Elation DMG dealt in this instance takes into account a fixed amount of 99 "Certified Banger" points.

name: I Carry, We Win
title: Enhance
desc_lv1:
After reaching 60 "Hidden MMR" points, the Ultimate can be activated. After reaching the maximum limit, it can overflow by an additional 240 point(s).
When gaining Punchline, Silver Wolf LV.999 gains an equal amount of "Hidden MMR." Each point of "Hidden MMR" increases CRIT Rate by 0.30%. After CRIT Rate increases to 100%, each remaining point of "Hidden MMR" switches to increasing CRIT DMG by 0.60%.
While in the "Godmode Player" state, Silver Wolf LV.999 is immune to Crowd Control debuffs, her CRIT DMG increases by 0%, cannot use her Ultimate, and gains Enhanced Basic ATK and Enhanced Elation Skill. After completely using Enhanced Basic ATK 3 time(s), she exits the "Godmode Player" state. After exiting the "Godmode Player" state, "Hidden MMR" is cleared.
While in possession of "Certified Banger," using Basic ATK or Skill against attacked enemy targets deals 40% Imaginary Elation DMG. Enhanced Basic ATK's ability DMG is converted to Elation DMG at the same multiplier.

name: False Ending Speedrun
title: ASCEND CALCULATOR A
desc_lv1: When SPD is 150 or higher, increases this unit's Elation by 30% . For every 1 SPD exceeded, increases this unit's Elation by 2% . Up to a max of 100 excess SPD can be taken into account for this effect.
raw_html_lv1: When SPD is 150 or higher, increases this unit's Elation by 30% . For every 1 SPD exceeded, increases this unit's Elation by 2% . Up to a max of 100 excess SPD can be taken into account for this effect.

name: True Ending Unlocked
title: ASCEND CALCULATOR B
desc_lv1: When using an Elation Skill, if the number of Punchline points taken into account for this Elation Skill reaches 20 / 40 , gains 20 / 40 "Hidden MMR" points.
raw_html_lv1: When using an Elation Skill, if the number of Punchline points taken into account for this Elation Skill reaches 20 / 40 , gains 20 / 40 "Hidden MMR" points.

name: Secret Level Maxed
title: ASCEND CALCULATOR C
desc_lv1: After entering the "Godmode Player" state, gains 20 point(s) of "Hidden MMR."
raw_html_lv1: After entering the "Godmode Player" state, gains 20 point(s) of "Hidden MMR."
